title: Elastic Collision of Bumper Cars
body: In an elastic collision, a 400-kg bumper car collides directly from behind with a second, identical bumper car that is traveling in the same direction. The initial speed of the leading bumper car is $$5.60$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ and that of the trailing car is $$6.00$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. Assume that the mass of the drivers is much, much less than that of the bumper cars.
